title: Wildfire flares up at Ruiterbos
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - After the wildfire at...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - After the wildfire at Ruitersbos was extinguished a week ago, a flare-up occurred on the north-eastern flank, west of the Moordkuils River today, 4 October.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - After the wildfire at Ruitersbos was extinguished a week ago, a flare-up occurred on the north-eastern flank, west of the Moordkuils River today, 4 October."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Garden Route District Municipality (GRDM) posted on its Facebook that no infrastructure is currently at risk and that a helicopter has been deployed to contain the affected area as the terrain remains inaccessible to ground crews."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It said the main priority is to prevent the fire from spreading toward the Friemersheim Pine Grove plantation and that the south-eastern section is the primary focus area.","html":"It said the main priority is to prevent the fire from spreading toward the Friemersheim Pine Grove plantation and that the south-eastern section is the primary focus area."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you spot a veld or wildfire, report it immediately to the GRDM emergency call centre at 044 805 5071 or via WhatsApp at 081 709 5193.","html":"If you spot a veld or wildfire, report it immediately to the GRDM emergency call centre at 044 805 5071 or via WhatsApp at 081 709 5193."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
